name: Lemon Chiffon Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Crust
1. Sprinkle the graham cracker crumbs on the bottom and sides of a lightly sprayed 9-inch pie plate.
Filling
2. In a blender, dissolve 3 ounces lemon gelatin powder in 2/3 cup boiling water.
3. Add 1 1/2 cups lowfat cottage cheese and 4 ounces fat-free cream cheese to the blender with the gelatin mixture. Cover and blend for about three minutes, scraping down the sides as needed.
4. Pour the blended mixture into a large bowl and fold in 1 package whipped cream (light).
5. Chill until set, approximately 5-6 hours.
Topping
6. Top the chilled cheesecake with 1 can cherry pie filling (20 ounces).
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
